perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a purple spaghetti-strap top and denim shorts, stands indoors looking directly at the camera. She starts speaking with an expressive, slightly annoyed facial expression, gesturing with her head. (2) As she continues her monologue, she leans slightly closer to the lens, her eyebrows furrowing and then relaxing as she recounts a dialogue. (3) She looks upward briefly as if mimicking someone thinking, then looks back at the camera to deliver the final statement with a smirk of disbelief.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice speaks in Mandarin with a conversational, slightly high-pitched and playful tone. Upbeat, rhythmic electronic background music begins. (2) The vocal continues the story with a questioning inflection. Brief sound effects like a subtle 'pop' or 'ding' accompany text appearing on screen. (3) The vocal delivers a short phrase with emphasis, followed immediately by a pre-recorded track of group laughter. The background music ends abruptly with the laugh track.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '淦' (Damn) - Frustrated/Expressive. (2) '被一個直男小弟弟氣死' (Angered by a straight younger guy) - Complainant tone. (3) '氣死😡' (So angry) - Exaggerated anger. (4) '他說喜歡我..' (He said he liked me..) - Narrative curiosity. (5) '我問他喜歡我什麼？' (I asked him what he liked about me?) - Inquiry. (6) '他想了一分鐘' (He thought for a minute) - Narrative setup. (7) '然後跟我說' (And then told me) - Anticipation. (8) '很肥美' (Very plump/succulent) - Humorous punchline.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator in the center of the frame.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young Asian woman with long, straight dark hair, wearing a light purple tank top and light blue denim shorts with a black belt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A home interior with wooden closet doors and some storage boxes visible behind her.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To entertain the audience by sharing a humorous and relatable anecdote about an awkward social interaction with a 'straight man' (clueless guy). The creator uses her physical appearance and a witty punchline to engage viewers through self-deprecating or situational comedy.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Direct-to-camera vlog style with variety-show style text captions.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video relies heavily on the 'straight man' trope common in Asian social media, where a guy's lack of romantic tact is used as the basis for a joke.
